progress.queued: Received by server and waiting for processing
progress.estimated: This is an estimated live stage. The request is still running; do not submit it again.
progress.live: Progress is reported by the server's actual processing stage.
progress.heartbeat: Server heartbeat is healthy; the task is still running.
progress.heartbeatEngine: The FastAPI engine heartbeat is healthy and the algorithm is still running.
progress.heartbeatGateway: The Go gateway is connected and waiting for the FastAPI engine.

loginRequired.title: Sign-in required
loginRequired.description: This tool is available to authorized users by default. Sign in to continue.

upload.title: Upload an image to inspect
upload.description: Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP images. The system extracts a 2-4 byte hidden watermark short code and verifies it through the trace database.
upload.referenceDescription: For a cropped, resized, or rotated screenshot, choose the complete watermarked image. The local Go or remote engine will align it before extracting the token.
upload.notice: If you do not have access, ask an administrator to add your account or enable all-user access in Hidden Watermark Access.

result.title: Inspection Result
result.empty: Upload an image to view the inspection result
result.placeholder: Results show whether the watermark exists, whether it is valid, and traceable fields.

errors.unsupportedType: Only JPEG, PNG, or WebP images are supported.
errors.fileTooLarge: The image is larger than the configured upload limit.
errors.invalidImage: The uploaded file is not a valid supported image.
errors.recoveryFailed: The screenshot could not be recovered. Verify that the reference is its complete watermarked image.
errors.remoteTimeout: The remote watermark service or gateway timed out. This does not mean the image has no watermark.
errors.remoteDisconnected: The remote watermark progress connection was interrupted. Try again later.
errors.forbidden: This account is not authorized to inspect hidden watermarks.
errors.failed: Hidden watermark inspection failed. Try again later.
